allow: Bash(node -e "const lock=require\(''C:/Users/henry/OneDrive/Documents/Repository/CustomerService/package-lock.json''\); const pkgs=lock.packages; const tanstack=Object.keys\(pkgs\).filter\(k=>k.includes\(''tanstack/react-router''\) && !k.includes\(''node_modules/''\)\); const vite=Object.keys\(pkgs\).filter\(k=>k.endsWith\(''/vite''\) && !k.includes\(''node_modules/''\)\); console.log\(''tanstack entries:'', tanstack\); console.log\(''vite entries:'', vite\); if\(pkgs[''node_modules/@tanstack/react-router'']\) console.log\(''installed tanstack version:'', pkgs[''node_modules/@tanstack/react-router''].version\); if\(pkgs[''node_modules/vite'']\) console.log\(''installed vite version:'', pkgs[''node_modules/vite''].version\);")

Bash(node --input-type=commonjs -e "const lock=require\(''./package-lock.json''\); const pkgs=lock.packages; if\(pkgs[''node_modules/@tanstack/react-router'']\) console.log\(''tanstack/react-router:'', pkgs[''node_modules/@tanstack/react-router''].version\); if\(pkgs[''node_modules/vite'']\) console.log\(''vite:'', pkgs[''node_modules/vite''].version\); if\(pkgs[''node_modules/@tanstack/router-vite-plugin'']\) console.log\(''router-vite-plugin:'', pkgs[''node_modules/@tanstack/router-vite-plugin''].version\);")

Bash(node --input-type=commonjs -e "const lock=require\(''./package-lock.json''\); const pkgs=lock.packages; const keys=Object.keys\(pkgs\).filter\(k=>k.includes\(''tanstack''\)||k.includes\(''vite''\)\).filter\(k=>!k.includes\(''node_modules/''\)\); console.log\(''workspace tanstack/vite entries:'', keys.length > 0 ? keys : ''none \(all in node_modules\)''\);")
